name: regression-negation-class-action
description: AI flags class_action_waiver but the quote says the waiver does not apply. Reproduces the Stripe class-action screenshot bug.
documentText: Most disputes are resolved between the parties without arbitration. The class action waiver in the preamble does not apply to disputes governed by jurisdictions that prohibit it.
rawAiResponse: {"serviceType":"fintech","flags":[{"category":"class_action_waiver","severity":"full","quote":"The class action waiver in the preamble does not apply"}],"credits":[]}
expectedReason: negation guard must reject a class-action quote that contains 'does not apply'
